pageContent:
Chakradhar SwamireddyLocation: Hyderabad, Telangana
Software Engineer | React · Next.js · Node.js · TypeScriptEmail: iamthechakri@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/chakradhar-swamireddy  |  github.com/chakriswamireddy  |  chakri-portfolio.vercel.appPhone: +91 93986 67036
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Full Stack Engineer with 2 years of experience building scalable, production grade web platforms using React.js, TypeScript,

and Node.js.  Experienced in designing distributed systems,  event driven architectures,  and secure backend services that
operate reliably under unreliable network conditions.  Delivered cloud native applications at Accountiez and IIT Bombay,
achieving up to 50% reduction in security incidents and 30% improvement in performance.  Strong foundation in system
design, API driven workflows, real time systems, and deployment orchestration at scale.
SKILLS & EXPERTISE

SKILLS & EXPERTISE
•Frontend:React.js (Hooks, Context, Router), Next.js, Redux, Zustand, Tailwind CSS, Material UI, shadcn ui.
•Languages:JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, HTML5, CSS.
•Backend and Systems:Node.js (Express), RESTful API design, WebSockets, asynchronous processing, event driven
systems, workflow orchestration, concurrency handling, state management, idempotent operations.
•Databases:PostgreSQL, MongoDB, scalable schema design, transactional workflows.

•Cloud and Infrastructure:Cloud native application development, AWS based deployments, distributed backend ser-
vices, system observability.
•Security:Authentication and authorization, certificate based security concepts, encryption practices, secure webhook
handling, hardened payment workflows.
•Tools and Workflow:Git, Drizzle ORM, BullMQ, Webpack, WebRTC, Liveblocks, Jest, Sentry, Vercel, Firebase.
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
•Frontend Developer, Accountiez Business SolutionsDec 2024 to Dec 2025

supporting scalable data ingestion and metadata orchestration.

and performance by 25% through reusable component architecture, role based access control, and optimized API
workflows.

data using event driven pipelines and WebSocket based updates, enabling near real time engagement insights and

tion, reducing production defects by 15%.
PROJECTS
•LiveDocs: Built a real-time collaborative document editor using Next.js, Liveblocks, and Clerk, supporting live cursors,
mentions, and threaded comments; designed a responsive UI with shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS, improving collabora-
tion efficiency by 25%.github.com/chakriswamireddy/Live-Docs  |  live-docs-three-silk.vercel.app

concurrent sessions with unique encrypted meeting IDs and sub-200ms connection latency.
